dax_expression: VAR LatestTime = MAX(FactTelemetry[event_time]) RETURN CALCULATE(AVERAGE(FactTelemetry[value]), FactTelemetry[event_time] = LatestTime)
description: Latest telemetry value in current filter context
Count of telemetry points outside normal envelope
Share of telemetry points outside normal envelope
Average health score for selected assets
Count of degraded or critical assets

dax_expression: VAR LatestTime = MAX(FactKPITimeSeries[timestamp]) RETURN CALCULATE(AVERAGE(FactKPITimeSeries[value]), FactKPITimeSeries[timestamp] = LatestTime)
description: Latest KPI value in current KPI and asset context
Count of event frames in selected context
Count of high severity event frames
